title: KhazodaCore
description: Library for Khazoda's mods containing lots of useful code
body:
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/26.1-active_development-seagreen)
[![Explore All Mods Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6d32f79d6730fcfa7eb1c59b0c71783f3429990.png)](https://khazoda.com)[![Full Mod Description Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bdc40049d20ff26aa3f65f03d2e758a352d1bce.png)](https://www.khazoda.com/khazodacore) # KhazodaCore **This is a library mod**. It doesn't add any content by itself, but supports the development of my other mods. You only need to install KhazodaCore if you're using any of my other mods on Minecraft 26.1+. # Frequently Asked Questions So far there have been no questions. If you have any, [ask me on Discord](https://discord.com/invite/vEZUkSxwR9).
